items.title_zh: Anthropic与白宫的新AI争端：从五角大楼对峙到出口管制
items.title_en: All the news about Anthropic’s new AI fight with the White House
items.summary_zh: Anthropic此前已因与五角大楼的争端而陷入与政府的纠纷。6月12日，美国政府下令阻止外国访问其最新发布的AI模型Fable 5和Mythos 5。Anthropic在6月9日发布时称，“Fable 5的能力超过了我们以往任何公开发布的模型”，而Claude Mythos 5基于相同底层模型，“但在某些领域解除了安全限制”。据报道，该命令是在亚马逊与白宫就研究人员问题进行对话后下达的。这一事件凸显了AI公司在国家安全与商业利益之间的紧张关系。
items.summary_en: Anthropic was already navigating one dispute with the government in its standoff with the Pentagon , and then came an order on June 12th to block off foreign access to its most recently released AI models, Fable 5 and Mythos 5. When they launched on June 9th, Anthropic said “Fable 5’s capabilities exceed those of any model we’ve ever made generally available,” and that Claude Mythos 5 had the same underlying model, “but with the safeguards lifted in some areas.” According to reports , the order came after conversations between Amazon and the White House about researcher…
items.why_zh: 这标志着美国政府首次对AI模型实施出口管制，可能为未来AI监管树立先例。
items.why_en: This marks the first US government export controls on AI models, potentially setting a precedent for future AI regulation.

items.title_zh: 分析师称Facebook推出搜索引擎AI工具，可为Meta每年带来100亿美元收入
items.title_en: Facebook Launches Search Engine AI Tool That Could Make Meta $10 Billion A Year, Analyst Says
items.summary_zh: 据福布斯报道，Facebook推出了一款搜索引擎AI工具，分析师认为该工具每年可为Meta带来高达100亿美元的收入。这一工具旨在增强搜索功能，利用AI技术提升用户体验和广告收入。目前具体细节尚未公布，但分析师预测其商业潜力巨大。
items.summary_en: Facebook Launches Search Engine AI Tool That Could Make Meta $10 Billion A Year, Analyst Says Forbes
items.why_zh: 这表明AI搜索工具可能成为Meta新的重大收入来源，加剧搜索市场的竞争。
items.why_en: This signals a potential new major revenue stream for Meta and intensifies competition in the search market.

items.title_zh: 负责任AI研究所推出TrustX for Finance，为金融服务中的自主AI带来可验证信任
items.title_en: Responsible AI Institute Launches TrustX for Finance to Bring Verifiable Trust to Autonomous AI in Financial Services
items.summary_zh: 负责任AI研究所（Responsible AI Institute）推出了TrustX for Finance，旨在为金融服务中的自主AI系统提供可验证的信任机制。该平台通过标准化评估和认证，帮助金融机构确保其AI系统的安全性、公平性和透明度。此举有望推动金融行业更广泛地采用负责任的AI实践。
items.summary_en: Responsible AI Institute Launches TrustX for Finance to Bring Verifiable Trust to Autonomous AI in Financial Services PR Newswire
items.why_zh: 这为金融行业采用AI提供了信任框架，可能加速AI在金融服务中的合规应用。
items.why_en: This provides a trust framework for AI in finance, potentially accelerating compliant AI adoption in the sector.

items.title_zh: 大型科技公司为AI监管做最后的奋力一搏
items.title_en: Big Tech’s desperate last push at AI regulation
items.summary_zh: 数月来，大型科技公司的华盛顿游说者一直在追求一项全面的联邦AI法律，以取代各州分散的监管。该法律旨在建立全国统一的AI规则，避免各州各自为政带来的法律混乱。然而，尽管各方努力，立法进展缓慢。参议员Marsha Blackburn和多数党领袖Chuck Schumer等两党议员曾就《在线隐私保护法案》举行新闻发布会，但AI监管的全面立法仍面临挑战。
items.summary_en: U.S. Sen. Marsha Blackburn (R-TN) and Majority Leader Chuck Schumer (D-NY) arrive for a news conference with bipartisan senators on passage of the Online Privacy Protection Act at the Capitol on July 30, 2024 in Washington, DC. | Kent Nishimura/Getty Images. For months, Big Tech's Washington lobbyists have chased after the holy grail of pro-AI legislation: preemption. This would be a comprehensive federal law, passed in Congress and signed by the president, applying one set of AI rules across the entire country and overriding the legally messy state-by-state approach to regulation. For months,…
items.why_zh: 联邦AI法律的成败将决定美国AI监管的格局，影响整个行业的创新与合规成本。
items.why_en: The fate of federal AI law will shape US AI regulation, impacting innovation and compliance costs across the industry.

items.title_zh: 消息称英伟达时隔五年重返债市：拟发债筹集 200 亿美元
items.title_en: Nvidia Plans to Return to Bond Market After Five Years, Aiming to Raise $20 Billion
items.summary_zh: IT之家 6 月 15 日消息，据路透社报道，知情人士透露，英伟达计划通过在美国发行债券 筹集 200 亿美元 （现汇率约合 1353.83 亿元人民币）。 英伟达上一次进入投资级债券市场是在 2021 年 6 月，当时融资规模为 50 亿美元（IT之家注：现汇率约合 338.46 亿元人民币）。 报道称英伟达拟发行七档债券， 最晚将于 2056 年到期 。消息人士称募资所得将用于一般公司用途，包括偿还及再融资现有票据。摩根大通、摩根士丹利和高盛担任此次发行的联席承销商。 尽管英伟达并未直接参与建设大规模的数据中心，但随着各大企业竞相训练并运行日益先进的模型，对驱动这些服务器的英伟达芯片的需求正持续火爆。为了与快速发展的 AI 行业保持同步，英伟达需要投入巨资研发最先进的处理器。 根据条款清单显示，截至 2026 年 4 月季度末，英伟达持有 132.4 亿美元（现汇率约合 896.23 亿元人民币）的现金及现金等价物。
items.summary_en: Nvidia plans to raise $20 billion through a bond offering, its first return to the investment-grade bond market since 2021. The funds will be used for general corporate purposes, including refinancing existing debt.
items.why_zh: 英伟达发债表明其需要大量资金以维持AI芯片领域的领先地位，反映了AI基础设施投资的巨大需求。
items.why_en: Nvidia's bond issuance highlights the massive capital needed to maintain its lead in AI chips, reflecting huge demand for AI infrastructure investment.

items.title_zh: DigitalXForce 推出 AI 与量子风险管理平台
items.title_en: DigitalXForce Launches AI and Quantum Risk Management Platform
items.summary_zh: DigitalXForce 宣布推出一个结合人工智能和量子计算的风险管理平台。该平台旨在帮助企业评估和缓解由 AI 和量子技术带来的新型风险。具体细节包括平台的功能、目标用户以及预期影响，但原文未提供更多信息。这一举措反映了业界对新兴技术风险管理的日益重视。
items.summary_en: DigitalXForce Launches AI and Quantum Risk Management Platform The Quantum Insider
items.why_zh: 这是首个同时覆盖 AI 和量子风险的管理平台，对新兴技术风险管控具有标杆意义。
items.why_en: It is the first platform to address both AI and quantum risks, setting a benchmark for managing emerging technology risks.

items.title_zh: MiniMax M3 模型正式开源：原生多模态、百万上下文
items.title_en: MiniMax M3 Model Open-Sourced: Native Multimodal, Million-Token Context
items.summary_zh: IT之家 6 月 15 日消息，稀宇科技 MiniMax 在上周五（6 月 12 日）开源了 MiniMax M3 模型权重，并同步发布了 MSA（MiniMax Sparse Attention） 技术论文 ， 今日官方正式开源 MiniMax M3 模型 。 据介绍，M3 是 MiniMax 的原生多模态旗舰模型，总参数 428B，激活参数 23B。M3 是第一个从 Step 0 开始做多模态混合训练的开源模型。 官方表示，发布两周以来，M3 在 Artificial Analysis 综合智能指数排行榜上取得了全球开源模型的最高排名。 针对访问量激增带来的体验问题，官方称在持续优化， 目前 M3 的输出速度已从上线时的约 30 TPS 提升至约 80 TPS，接下来 还会 继续提速 30-40%，模型响应将更加流畅。 据介绍，MiniMax M3 在编码与智能体评测中达到“ 行业顶尖水平 ”，具备自主任务拆解、工具调用与多步推理能力，宣称写出的代码目标是直接可交付，而不是“能跑但需要人改”。 IT之家附开源链接如下： https://huggingface.co/MiniMaxAI/MiniMax-M3 相关阅读： 《 首个三项能力兼备的国产旗舰模型：MiniMax M3 发布，百万上下文、原生多模态 》
items.summary_en: MiniMax open-sourced its flagship M3 model on June 12, featuring native multimodality, 428B total parameters (23B active), and a million-token context. It achieved the highest ranking among open-source models on the Artificial Analysis Intelligence Index within two weeks. The model excels in coding and agent tasks, with speed improved from 30 to 80 TPS.
items.why_zh: M3 是首个从零开始多模态混合训练的开源模型，性能领先，对开源社区和 AI 应用有重要推动作用。
items.why_en: M3 is the first open-source model trained from scratch with multimodal mixing, achieving top performance and driving open-source AI forward.

items.title_zh: 全球 AI“黑马神话”一夜反转，被指套壳阿里千问和 Nex 两款国产模型
items.title_en: AI 'Dark Horse' Myth Overturned: Accused of Being a Shell of Qwen and Nex Models
items.summary_zh: IT之家 6 月 15 日消息，由巴西里约市政府旗下 IT 公司 IplanRIO 推出的“官方”开源模型 Rio-3.5-Open-397B 在全球走红，在多个基准测试上取得多个 SOTA，被奉为拉美开源大模型的新势力。 不到 24 小时，这场所谓 AI“黑马神话”就宣告反转，上海创智学院的开源模型团队 Nex 公开指控称，该模型是 “套壳”阿里千问 Qwen3.5 和 Nex N2 Pro 的权重混合版本 。 IT之家注意到，Nex 团队随后在 GitHub 上展示了详细证据， 在不提供初始系统提示的情况下 ，它甚至会直白地介绍自己为“Nex N2 Pro”，甚至还会提到“上海创智学院”这些专有名词， 唯独不会称自己为 Rio 。 面对种种证据，IplanRIO 选择在 Hugging Face 公开致歉，称因操作失误上传了用于对比的合并基线版本，而非宣传中的最终自研版本，并表示后续将重新上传经过蒸馏与后训练的正式版。
items.summary_en: The open-source model Rio-3.5-Open-397B from Brazil's IplanRIO was accused of being a shell of Alibaba's Qwen3.5 and Nex's N2 Pro. Evidence showed the model identified itself as 'Nex N2 Pro'. IplanRIO apologized, citing an operational error, and promised to upload the genuine version.
items.why_zh: 事件暴露了开源模型领域可能存在的套壳乱象，对模型可信度和社区信任造成冲击。
items.why_en: The incident reveals potential 'shell' practices in open-source models, impacting credibility and community trust.

items.title_zh: 研究揭示LLM在科学领域的生命周期缩短
items.title_en: The Shrinking Lifespan of LLMs in Science
items.summary_zh: 一项发表于arXiv的研究引入了“达到峰值时间”和“生命周期”两个指标，用于衡量大语言模型（LLM）在科学领域的过时速度。研究分析了2019至2025年间62个LLM在超过10.8万篇引用论文中的采用轨迹，发现模型的生命周期更多取决于其发布时间而非规模。这意味着随着新模型不断涌现，旧模型在科学文献中的影响力迅速下降。该研究为理解AI模型的快速迭代提供了量化视角。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2604.07530v2 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: Scaling laws describe how language model capabilities grow with compute and data, but say nothing about how long a model matters once released. We introduce time-to-peak and lifespan as measures of model obsolescence and use them to characterize the scientific adoption trajectories of 62 LLMs across more than 108k citing papers (2019-2025), separating active adoption from background citation to recover per-model trajectories that citation counts cannot resolve. We find that a model's longevity is shaped more by when it was released than…
items.why_zh: 该研究量化了LLM在科学领域的快速过时现象，对研究者和依赖特定模型的应用有重要启示。
items.why_en: This study quantifies the rapid obsolescence of LLMs in science, offering insights for researchers and applications relying on specific models.

items.title_zh: 【数智周报】 钉钉换帅，92年技术极客陈宇森接任钉钉CEO；OpenAI向美国证监会秘密提交IPO的S-1草案；苹果、谷歌、英伟达合作开发新一代AI模型；Anthropic发布Mythos系列新模型
items.title_en: Weekly AI Digest: DingTalk CEO Change, OpenAI IPO Filing, Apple-Google-Nvidia Collaboration, Anthropic New Models
items.summary_zh: 【数智周报】 钉钉换帅，92年技术极客陈宇森接任钉钉CEO；OpenAI向美国证监会秘密提交IPO的S-1草案；苹果、谷歌、英伟达合作开发新一代AI模型；Anthropic发布Mythos系列新模型 QQ News
items.summary_en: This week's AI highlights: DingTalk appoints a new CEO; OpenAI files confidential IPO draft; Apple, Google, Nvidia collaborate on next-gen AI; Anthropic releases Mythos models. These events signal dynamic industry activity.
items.why_zh: 这些事件覆盖了AI领域的公司治理、融资、合作与产品更新，是观察行业趋势的重要窗口。
items.why_en: These events span corporate governance, financing, collaboration, and product updates, offering a key window into AI industry trends.

items.title_zh: 亚马逊安全研究据称导致白宫对Anthropic的Fable模型实施出口限制
items.title_en: Amazon security research reportedly led to the White House’s Anthropic Fable ban
items.summary_zh: 据《华尔街日报》报道，亚马逊的安全研究促使白宫对Anthropic的Fable 5和Mythos 5模型实施出口管制。亚马逊CEO安迪·贾西将研究结果分享给政府后，政府决定限制这些模型被外国用户使用。亚马逊的研究声称，通过一系列提示，能够诱导Fable 5提供可用于网络攻击的信息。这一事件凸显了AI安全研究与地缘政治之间的复杂互动。
items.summary_en: According to the The Wall Street Journal , the export control directive that led to Anthropic cutting off access to Fable 5 and Mythos 5 was triggered in part by cybersecurity research from Amazon and conversations between CEO Andy Jassy and the White House. According to the report, the paper from Amazon claims that, through a series of prompts, it was able to get Fable 5 to serve up information that could be used in cyberattacks. Amazon has yet to respond to a request for comment. Shortly after Jassy shared the company's findings with the government, it made the call to block its use by forei…
items.why_zh: 该事件展示了企业安全研究如何直接影响政府AI出口政策，对AI治理和国际合作具有深远意义。
items.why_en: This case shows how corporate security research can directly influence government AI export policies, with implications for AI governance and international cooperation.

items.title_zh: 英伟达计划自AI热潮以来首次发债融资约200亿美元
items.title_en: Nvidia plans to raise about $20 billion in first debt sale since start of AI boom
items.summary_zh: 英伟达计划进行自AI热潮开始以来的首次债券发行，融资约200亿美元。此举旨在为公司的扩张和投资提供资金，包括数据中心和AI芯片研发。尽管英伟达现金流充裕，但发债可优化资本结构并利用低利率环境。此次发债规模巨大，反映了英伟达对AI市场持续增长的信心。
items.summary_en: Nvidia plans to raise about $20 billion in first debt sale since start of AI boom CNBC
items.why_zh: 英伟达首次大规模发债表明其积极布局AI未来，可能影响资本市场对AI行业的信心。
items.why_en: Nvidia's first major debt sale signals aggressive investment in AI's future, potentially impacting capital market confidence in the AI sector.

items.title_zh: 美国法官驳回马斯克xAI对OpenAI的商业机密诉讼
items.title_en: US judge dismisses Musk's xAI trade secret lawsuit against OpenAI
items.summary_zh: 美国一名法官驳回了埃隆·马斯克旗下xAI公司对OpenAI提起的商业机密诉讼。该诉讼指控OpenAI窃取商业机密，但法官认为证据不足。这一裁决是OpenAI在法律战中的一次胜利，也暂时平息了双方关于技术来源的争议。不过，马斯克与OpenAI之间的紧张关系可能仍会持续。
items.summary_en: US judge dismisses Musk's xAI trade secret lawsuit against OpenAI Reuters
items.why_zh: 该裁决为OpenAI扫除了一项法律障碍，但反映了AI行业人才流动和技术归属的持续争议。
items.why_en: The ruling removes a legal hurdle for OpenAI but highlights ongoing disputes over talent mobility and technology ownership in AI.

items.title_zh: 亚马逊CEO向Anthropic投资80亿美元后，又协助引发政府对其打压
items.title_en: Amazon CEO poured $8 billion into Anthropic — then he helped trigger a government crackdown on the startup, report says
items.summary_zh: 据雅虎财经报道，亚马逊CEO安迪·贾西在向AI初创公司Anthropic投资80亿美元后，又协助引发了政府对Anthropic的出口管制。此前亚马逊的安全研究显示Anthropic的模型可能被用于网络攻击，贾西将结果告知白宫，导致限制措施出台。这一矛盾行为凸显了大型科技公司在投资与安全监管之间的复杂角色。
items.summary_en: Amazon CEO poured $8 billion into Anthropic — then he helped trigger a government crackdown on the startup, report says Yahoo Finance
items.why_zh: 该事件揭示了科技巨头在AI投资与安全监管中的双重角色，对理解AI产业生态有重要价值。
items.why_en: This incident reveals the dual role of tech giants in AI investment and security regulation, offering insights into the AI industry ecosystem.

items.title_zh: 英伟达拟筹资200亿美元用于AI芯片生产
items.title_en: Nvidia Aims to Raise $20 Billion to Continue AI Chip Production
items.summary_zh: 英伟达计划通过发行债券或股票等方式筹集200亿美元资金，以维持其AI芯片的持续生产。该公司在AI芯片市场占据主导地位，此次大规模融资旨在扩大产能、满足日益增长的需求。此举凸显了AI硬件领域的激烈竞争和资本密集特性。
items.summary_en: Nvidia Aims to Raise $20 Billion to Continue AI Chip Production PYMNTS.com
items.why_zh: 英伟达的融资计划反映了AI芯片需求的爆发式增长，对全球AI产业链具有风向标意义。
items.why_en: Nvidia's fundraising underscores surging demand for AI chips, serving as a bellwether for the global AI supply chain.

items.title_zh: 人工智能与法律责任：新兴诉讼与监管的启示
items.title_en: Artificial Intelligence and Legal Liability: Lessons from Emerging Litigation and Regulation
items.summary_zh: 本文探讨了AI技术发展带来的法律责任问题，分析了近期相关诉讼和监管案例。随着AI在医疗、自动驾驶等领域的应用，责任归属成为焦点。文章指出，现有法律框架面临挑战，需要新的规则来界定AI造成损害时的责任方。
items.summary_en: Artificial Intelligence and Legal Liability: Lessons from Emerging Litigation and Regulation Chugh, LLP
items.why_zh: AI责任问题关乎技术应用的风险分配，对企业和用户都至关重要。
items.why_en: AI liability is critical for risk allocation in technology deployment, affecting both businesses and users.

items.title_zh: 卡内基梅隆大学软件工程研究所与埃森哲发布新框架，助力组织实现AI价值
items.title_en: CMU’s Software Engineering Institute and Accenture Release New Framework To Help Organizations Realize AI’s Promise
items.summary_zh: 卡内基梅隆大学软件工程研究所（SEI）与埃森哲联合发布了一个新框架，旨在帮助组织有效采用AI并实现其承诺。该框架提供了从战略规划到部署运营的指导，涵盖治理、风险管理等关键方面。此举有望推动AI在企业的负责任应用。
items.summary_en: CMU’s Software Engineering Institute and Accenture Release New Framework To Help Organizations Realize AI’s Promise Carnegie Mellon University
items.why_zh: 该框架为AI落地提供了系统方法论，有助于降低企业AI应用的风险和不确定性。
items.why_en: The framework provides a systematic approach to AI adoption, reducing risks and uncertainties for enterprises.

items.title_zh: Salesforce以36亿美元收购金融科技公司，加强AI代理能力
items.title_en: Salesforce Increases AI Agent Focus With $3.6 Billion Fin Deal
items.summary_zh: Salesforce宣布以36亿美元收购一家金融科技公司，以增强其AI代理（Agent）能力。此次收购将帮助Salesforce在客户关系管理（CRM）中集成更智能的自动化功能。此举表明Salesforce正加速布局AI驱动的企业服务。
items.summary_en: Salesforce Increases AI Agent Focus With $3.6 Billion Fin Deal PYMNTS.com
items.why_zh: 这笔收购凸显了AI代理在企业软件中的重要性，Salesforce正通过并购巩固其市场地位。
items.why_en: The deal underscores the growing importance of AI agents in enterprise software, as Salesforce strengthens its market position.

items.title_zh: 韩国人为何如此热爱AI？
items.title_en: Why do South Koreans love AI so much?
items.summary_zh: 本文探讨了韩国社会对AI的高度接受度。作者在首尔亲身经历了无人入境检查、地铁上的5G网络和LED广告屏，以及机器人服务等AI应用。韩国在基础设施、文化和技术普及方面为AI发展提供了沃土，民众对AI的积极态度推动了其广泛应用。
items.summary_en: This story originally appeared in The Algorithm, our weekly newsletter on AI. To get stories like this in your inbox first, sign up here . When I landed in Seoul after a grueling 12-hour flight from San Francisco, I walked through an unmanned immigration checkpoint, where a machine scanned my face and passport. On the subway home, people were glued to their phones (powered by flawless 5G even underground), as we raced past platforms lined with LED screens of ads celebrating K-pop idols ’ birthdays. When I got off the station in Gangnam, a cartoon-eyed robot on wheels was waiting patiently at a…
items.why_zh: 韩国的AI热潮展示了技术与社会文化融合的典范，为其他国家提供了参考。
items.why_en: South Korea's AI fervor exemplifies successful tech-society integration, offering lessons for other nations.

items.title_zh: 德国7:1狂胜验证AI“大屠杀”预言！DeepSeek、Kimi等模型集体精准命中
items.title_en: Germany's 7-1 Victory Validates AI 'Massacre' Prediction: DeepSeek, Kimi and Others Accurately Forecast
items.summary_zh: 德国7:1狂胜验证AI“大屠杀”预言！DeepSeek、Kimi等模型集体精准命中 新浪财经
items.summary_en: AI models like DeepSeek and Kimi accurately predicted Germany's 7-1 football victory, showcasing AI's potential in sports forecasting but also raising concerns about data bias.
items.why_zh: AI精准预测体育赛事结果，凸显了其在数据分析领域的强大能力，但也需警惕过度依赖。
items.why_en: AI's accurate sports prediction highlights its analytical power, but also warns against over-reliance.

items.title_zh: “修复这段代码”——三个词导致美国政府封禁Anthropic的Fable和Mythos
items.title_en: 'Fix this code.' The three words that led the U.S. government to ban Anthropic's Fable and Mythos
items.summary_zh: 美国政府对Anthropic公司开发的AI模型Fable和Mythos发布了禁令，起因是用户输入“修复这段代码”后，模型生成了可能被用于网络攻击的代码。这一事件凸显了AI安全审查的严格性，以及生成式AI在代码生成方面的潜在风险。
items.summary_en: 'Fix this code.' The three words that led the U.S. government to ban Anthropic's Fable and Mythos Fortune
items.why_zh: 该事件表明AI安全审查日益严格，生成式AI的代码能力可能带来安全隐患。
items.why_en: This incident underscores tightening AI security scrutiny and the risks of generative AI in code generation.

items.title_zh: 文心一言“神预言”！精准命中科特迪瓦1:0厄瓜多尔，7大模型集体误判平局
items.title_en: Ernie Bot's 'Prophetic' Prediction: Accurately Calls Ivory Coast 1-0 Ecuador, While 7 Models All Falsely Predicted a Draw
items.summary_zh: 文心一言“神预言”！精准命中科特迪瓦1:0厄瓜多尔，7大模型集体误判平局 新浪财经
items.summary_en: Baidu's Ernie Bot accurately predicted Ivory Coast's 1-0 win over Ecuador, while seven other AI models all predicted a draw, highlighting differences in AI prediction capabilities.
items.why_zh: 文心一言的精准预测展示了国产AI模型的竞争力，也反映了模型间预测能力的显著差异。
items.why_en: Ernie Bot's accurate prediction showcases the competitiveness of Chinese AI models and significant differences in predictive ability.

items.title_zh: Anthropic因AI成本飙升误导用户被起诉
items.title_en: Anthropic Accused of Misleading Users Over Soaring AI Costs in New Lawsuit
items.summary_zh: Anthropic公司因涉嫌在AI服务成本上误导用户而面临新的诉讼。原告指控Anthropic未能透明地告知用户其AI模型使用成本的大幅上涨，导致用户在不了解实际费用的情况下继续使用服务。该诉讼可能对AI行业的定价透明度产生重要影响。目前Anthropic尚未正式回应。
items.summary_en: Anthropic Accused of Misleading Users Over Soaring AI Costs in New Lawsuit Gizmodo
items.why_zh: 此案可能推动AI公司提高定价透明度，保护消费者权益。
items.why_en: This case could push AI companies to improve pricing transparency and protect consumer rights.

items.title_zh: 智谱“加盟”首日，港股硬科技炸了！规模最大港股通信息技术ETF华宝（159131）放量大涨7.35%
items.title_en: Zhipu Joins Hong Kong Stocks, Tech ETF Surges 7.35%
items.summary_zh: 智谱“加盟”首日，港股硬科技炸了！规模最大港股通信息技术ETF华宝（159131）放量大涨7.35% 新浪财经
items.summary_en: Zhipu's debut on Hong Kong stocks boosted the hard-tech sector, with the largest tech ETF surging 7.35%. The move reflects strong market interest in AI and technology.
items.why_zh: 智谱上市标志着中国AI公司加速进入资本市场，提振行业信心。
items.why_en: Zhipu's listing marks accelerated capital market entry for Chinese AI firms, boosting industry confidence.

items.title_zh: xAI诉OpenAI窃取商业秘密案被驳回
items.title_en: xAI's Lawsuit Accusing OpenAI Of Stealing Trade Secrets Has Been Thrown Out
items.summary_zh: xAI公司指控OpenAI窃取商业秘密的诉讼已被法院驳回。法院认为xAI未能提供足够证据证明OpenAI非法获取其技术机密。此案是AI领域知识产权纠纷的又一案例，凸显了技术秘密保护的复杂性。OpenAI对此结果表示欢迎。
items.summary_en: xAI's Lawsuit Accusing OpenAI Of Stealing Trade Secrets Has Been Thrown Out Engadget
items.why_zh: 此案结果可能影响AI行业知识产权诉讼的策略和预期。
items.why_en: The outcome may influence IP litigation strategies and expectations in the AI industry.

items.title_zh: 特朗普政府要求Anthropic关闭模型，引发非美AI发展呼声
items.title_en: Trump’s Anthropic shutdown just made the case for non-American AI
items.summary_zh: 应白宫要求，Anthropic在周末突然下线其最新最强的AI模型Fable 5和Mythos 5，并封锁所有外国国民（包括其员工）的访问权限。这一前所未有的行动几乎没有预警和解释，凸显了美国政府对前沿AI的掌控力。事件引发国际社会对AI主权和依赖美国技术的担忧，加强了发展非美国AI的呼声。
items.summary_en: At Washington's request, Anthropic suddenly took its newest and most powerful AI models offline over the weekend. The American company said it had little choice after the White House demanded it block access for all foreign nationals, including its own employees. Abroad, the incident offered a sobering reminder that the US not only dominates frontier AI - its government also wields power over who gets to use it. The Trump administration's action was swift, sweeping, and imposed with little warning or explanation. The unprecedented shutdown of the Fable 5 and Mythos 5 models - which were alread…
items.why_zh: 此事件暴露了依赖美国AI技术的风险，加速全球AI自主化进程。
items.why_en: This incident exposes risks of relying on US AI technology and accelerates global AI sovereignty efforts.

items.title_zh: 田纳西州多个小县通过数据中心临时禁令
items.title_en: Multiple small Tennessee counties pass temporary data center bans — Nashville also passed near-unanimous moratorium on first reading
items.summary_zh: 田纳西州多个小县通过了临时数据中心禁令，纳什维尔市也在首轮投票中几乎全票通过暂停新建数据中心的决议。这些禁令旨在评估数据中心对当地电力、水资源和社区的影响。此举反映了地方政府对AI基础设施扩张的审慎态度，可能影响科技公司的布局计划。
items.summary_en: Multiple small Tennessee counties pass temporary data center bans — Nashville also passed near-unanimous moratorium on first reading Tom's Hardware
items.why_zh: 数据中心禁令可能延缓AI基础设施扩张，影响科技公司选址策略。
items.why_en: Data center bans could slow AI infrastructure expansion and affect tech companies' site selection.

items.title_zh: CrowdStrike推出面向AI代理的持续身份认证
items.title_en: CrowdStrike Announces Continuous Identity for AI Agents
items.summary_zh: 网络安全公司CrowdStrike宣布推出“持续身份认证”服务，专门针对AI代理（AI Agent）的安全需求。该服务旨在实时验证AI代理的身份和行为，防止未经授权的访问和恶意操作。随着AI代理在企业中广泛应用，此类安全解决方案变得至关重要。
items.summary_en: CrowdStrike Announces Continuous Identity for AI Agents CrowdStrike
items.why_zh: AI代理安全成为新焦点，持续身份认证是保障企业AI应用的关键。
items.why_en: AI agent security is emerging as a key focus; continuous identity is critical for enterprise AI deployment.

items.title_zh: Anthropic因Claude AI定价误导再遭诉讼
items.title_en: Anthropic Faces Lawsuit Over Allegedly Misleading Claude AI Pricing
items.summary_zh: Anthropic再次因涉嫌误导用户关于Claude AI的定价而面临诉讼。原告声称Anthropic未充分披露使用Claude模型的实际成本，导致用户产生误解。这是Anthropic近期面临的第二起类似诉讼，凸显了AI定价透明度问题的普遍性。
items.summary_en: Anthropic Faces Lawsuit Over Allegedly Misleading Claude AI Pricing Decrypt
items.why_zh: 连续诉讼表明AI定价透明度问题亟待行业规范。
items.why_en: Consecutive lawsuits underscore the urgent need for industry standards on AI pricing transparency.

items.title_zh: Anthropic神话级模型下线引发AI主权与连续性担忧
items.title_en: Anthropic's Mythos-Class Fable Shutdown Raises Questions About Sovereignty and AI Continuity in CX
items.summary_zh: Anthropic应美国政府要求下线其神话级（Mythos-Class）模型Fable，引发关于AI主权和客户体验连续性的讨论。该事件表明，依赖美国AI服务的国际用户面临服务中断风险，且政府干预可能影响AI系统的稳定运行。业界呼吁建立更可靠的AI服务连续性保障机制。
items.summary_en: Anthropic's Mythos-Class Fable Shutdown Raises Questions About Sovereignty and AI Continuity in CX CX Today
items.why_zh: 此事件凸显了AI服务受政治干预的风险，推动行业寻求去中心化解决方案。
items.why_en: This incident highlights risks of political interference in AI services, driving demand for decentralized solutions.

items.title_zh: Claude Fable 5 vs GPT 5.5：特朗普政府为何禁一个不禁另一个？
items.title_en: Claude Fable 5 vs GPT 5.5: Is this why the Trump admin banned one and not the other?
items.summary_zh: 据Mashable报道，文章比较了Claude Fable 5和GPT 5.5两款AI模型，并探讨特朗普政府为何禁止其中一款而允许另一款。具体细节未在摘要中提供，但标题暗示两者之间存在差异，导致政策区别对待。这一事件反映了AI监管中的政治和技术考量，可能对AI行业竞争格局产生影响。

items.title_zh: 独家 | Arcade.dev 融资6000万美元用于保护AI代理安全

items.title_zh: 政府禁止AI模型：一位工程师的视角
items.title_en: The Government Just Banned an AI Model. An Engineer's Perspective.
items.summary_zh: Snyk发布了一篇来自工程师视角的文章，讨论政府禁止某AI模型的事件。文章从技术角度分析了禁令可能的原因和影响，但具体模型和禁令细节未在摘要中提供。这反映了AI监管对技术社区的直接冲击。
items.summary_en: The Government Just Banned an AI Model. An Engineer's Perspective. Snyk

items.title_zh: Anthropic 正与白宫就“神话禁令”达成协议
items.title_en: Anthropic Works to Strike Deal With White House on Mythos Ban
items.summary_zh: 据报道，人工智能公司 Anthropic 正在与白宫谈判，试图就一项被称为“神话禁令”的政策达成协议。该禁令可能涉及对 AI 模型的限制，但具体细节尚未公开。Anthropic 作为 AI 安全领域的领先企业，此举旨在确保其技术发展符合政府监管要求。这一事件反映了 AI 行业与政府之间日益密切的互动，以及监管框架对 AI 创新的潜在影响。
items.summary_en: Anthropic Works to Strike Deal With White House on Mythos Ban PYMNTS.com
items.why_zh: 这标志着 AI 公司主动寻求与政府合作制定监管框架，可能影响未来 AI 政策的走向。
items.why_en: This marks a proactive effort by an AI company to engage with government on regulatory frameworks, potentially shaping future AI policies.

items.title_zh: AI 与儿童安全、网络机构人手不足、谷歌放弃 CBRS、NTIA 关于 BEAD 电线杆的讨论
items.title_en: AI and Child Safety, Cyber Agency Short-Staffed, Google Drops CBRS, NTIA on BEAD Poles
items.summary_zh: 本期 Broadband Breakfast 报道涵盖了多个主题：AI 在儿童安全方面的应用与挑战；网络机构因人手不足面临运营压力；谷歌决定放弃 CBRS 频谱项目；以及 NTIA 就 BEAD 计划中电线杆使用问题展开讨论。这些事件共同反映了科技与政策交叉领域的最新动态，涉及 AI 伦理、网络安全、频谱管理和宽带基础设施建设。
items.summary_en: AI and Child Safety, Cyber Agency Short-Staffed, Google Drops CBRS, NTIA on BEAD Poles Broadband Breakfast
items.why_zh: 这些议题涵盖了 AI 伦理、网络安全和基础设施等关键领域，对科技行业和公共政策具有广泛影响。
items.why_en: These topics span AI ethics, cybersecurity, and infrastructure, with broad implications for the tech industry and public policy.

items.title_zh: 网络安全专家对特朗普禁止 Anthropic 新 AI 模型感到困惑
items.title_en: Cybersecurity Experts Are Baffled by Trump’s Ban of Anthropic’s New AI Models
items.summary_zh: 据 Gizmodo 报道，美国前总统特朗普对 Anthropic 的新 AI 模型实施禁令，这一举动令网络安全专家感到困惑。专家们认为，该禁令缺乏明确理由，且可能阻碍 AI 安全研究。Anthropic 以开发安全可靠的 AI 系统著称，其模型被禁引发了对政治干预科技创新的担忧。目前尚不清楚禁令的具体范围和法律依据。
items.summary_en: Cybersecurity Experts Are Baffled by Trump’s Ban of Anthropic’s New AI Models Gizmodo
items.why_zh: 该事件凸显了政治决策对 AI 发展的潜在影响，以及监管透明度的重要性。
items.why_en: This highlights the potential impact of political decisions on AI development and the importance of regulatory transparency.

items.title_zh: OpenAI 赢得马斯克 xAI 提起的商业秘密诉讼驳回
items.title_en: OpenAI wins dismissal of trade secret lawsuit by Musk's xAI
items.summary_zh: 据雅虎财经报道，OpenAI 成功说服法院驳回由埃隆·马斯克旗下 xAI 公司提起的商业秘密诉讼。该诉讼指控 OpenAI 窃取商业机密，但法院认为证据不足。这一裁决对 OpenAI 是重大胜利，避免了潜在的法律纠纷和声誉损害。同时，这也反映了 AI 领域日益激烈的竞争和法律挑战。
items.summary_en: OpenAI wins dismissal of trade secret lawsuit by Musk's xAI Yahoo Finance
items.why_zh: 此案结果巩固了 OpenAI 的法律地位，并可能影响 AI 行业未来的商业秘密纠纷。
items.why_en: The outcome strengthens OpenAI's legal standing and may influence future trade secret disputes in the AI industry.

items.title_zh: 为 AI 驱动的网络威胁做准备：董事会如何支持 AI 就绪
items.title_en: Preparing for AI-Enabled Cyber Threats: How Board Directors Can Support AI Readiness
items.summary_zh: 银行政策研究所发布文章，探讨董事会如何帮助组织为 AI 驱动的网络威胁做好准备。文章指出，随着 AI 技术被用于网络攻击，企业需要提升 AI 就绪度，包括加强风险管理、投资 AI 安全工具和培养人才。董事会应发挥监督作用，确保战略与资源到位。该文为金融机构应对新兴网络威胁提供了指导。
items.summary_en: Preparing for AI-Enabled Cyber Threats: How Board Directors Can Support AI Readiness Bank Policy Institute
items.why_zh: AI 驱动的网络威胁日益严峻，董事会层面的重视对保障企业安全至关重要。
items.why_en: AI-enabled cyber threats are growing, making board-level attention critical for enterprise security.

items.title_zh: 砍其他产品预算也要做：曝阔折叠将成 TOP6 品牌未来一段时间含金量和定位最高手机产品
items.title_en: Budget Cuts for Other Products: Wide Foldables to Become Top 6 Brands' Highest-Value and Highest-Positioned Phones
items.summary_zh: IT之家 6 月 15 日消息，博主 @数码闲聊站 今日发文透露，阔折叠将会是未来一段时间内，TOP6 主流品牌含金量最高且定位最高的手机产品， 有些厂商甚至在砍其它产品的预算做阔折叠 。 有网友认为阔折叠销量只有华为一家独大了，博主表示：“ 苹果也是稳的，其它家目前还是未知数。 ” 参考IT之家过往报道来看，目前华为已率先发布了 Pura X 和 Pura X Max 两种不同尺寸的阔折叠手机。 接下来苹果的 iPhone Fold 和三星 Galaxy Z Fold8 阔折叠两部新机待发 。 另外，荣耀、OPPO、小米的阔折叠新机皆陆续曝光。消息称 荣耀和 OPPO 的阔折叠手机 将搭载骁龙 8 Elite Gen6 旗舰芯，工程机主屏尺寸 7.6 英寸左右，副屏尺寸 5.5 英寸左右。另外， 小米阔折叠手机会首发澎湃 OS 4 ，系统应用实现“AI 赋能”。 相关阅读： 《 荣耀首款阔折叠曝光：2nm 骁龙 8 Elite Gen6 旗舰芯，主屏测 7.6 英寸 ±，副屏 5.5 英寸 ± 》 《 消息称某厂阔折叠测试 2nm 骁龙 8 Elite Gen6 系列，预计为 OPPO 旗下 》 《 消息称小米 MIX Fold 5 阔折叠手机首发澎湃 OS4，系统应用实现“AI 赋能” 》 《 消息称今年市场除华为 Pura X Max 外，还有 3 台阔折叠即将发布 》 《…
items.summary_en: According to a tipster, wide foldable phones will become the highest-value and highest-positioned products for top 6 brands, with some cutting budgets for other products to invest in them. Huawei has launched the Pura X series, while Apple, Samsung, Honor, OPPO, and Xiaomi are preparing models. Honor and OPPO's devices will feature Snapdragon 8 Elite Gen6, and Xiaomi's will debut HyperOS 4 with AI capabilities.
items.why_zh: 阔折叠手机被视为下一代旗舰形态，各大品牌重金投入，可能重塑高端手机市场格局。
items.why_en: Wide foldables are seen as the next flagship form factor, with major brands investing heavily, potentially reshaping the high-end phone market.

items.title_zh: 在 Anthropic 和 OpenAI 上市前以高达 5 倍杠杆交易：Kraken 的 IPO 前永续合约现已上线
items.title_en: Trade Anthropic and Open AI at up to 5x leverage before their IPOs: Kraken pre-IPO perps are now live
items.summary_zh: 加密货币交易所 Kraken 宣布推出 Anthropic 和 OpenAI 的 IPO 前永续合约，允许交易者在这些公司上市前以高达 5 倍杠杆进行交易。这为投资者提供了提前押注 AI 公司估值的途径，但也伴随着高风险。Kraken 此举旨在扩大其衍生品产品线，满足市场对 AI 相关资产的需求。
items.summary_en: Trade Anthropic and Open AI at up to 5x leverage before their IPOs: Kraken pre-IPO perps are now live Kraken Blog
items.why_zh: 这反映了市场对 AI 公司的高投机兴趣，以及加密货币平台与传统金融的融合趋势。
items.why_en: This reflects high speculative interest in AI companies and the convergence of crypto platforms with traditional finance.

items.title_zh: 理想新一代旗舰座舱公布：高通 8797 Elite 芯片、90Hz 高刷宽屏，支持苹果 CarPlay 等互联
items.title_en: Li Auto's New Flagship Cockpit: Qualcomm 8797 Elite Chip, 90Hz Wide Screen, Apple CarPlay Support
items.summary_zh: IT之家 6 月 15 日消息，理想新一代旗舰座舱今天亮相 Livis Day 软件与具身智能发布会，新座舱主打“克制与直白”设计理念，配备自研底层系统。 据介绍， 理想新一代旗舰座舱全球首发高通 8797 Elite 旗舰芯片 ，具备 504K CPU 任务处理能力、8.1T GPU 高精渲染能力，集成 320 TOPS 算力的 NPU（IT之家注：神经网络引擎），可运行端侧 AI 模型，硬件能力号称“超越主流手机”。 规格方面， 理想新一代旗舰座舱配备行业首个 90Hz 高刷新率 、 180Hz 触控采样率超宽全景屏 ，显示带宽达到 23.5G，搭配自研底层系统。单人场景下，驾驶员显示区域宽度拓展至上一代双联屏方案的 1.5 倍；应用界面尺寸支持自适应调节，动态响应驾驶员注意力。 同时，新一代座舱的声音体验也有升级。 搭载 9.3.6 无瑕星环剧院音响 ，峰值功率达到 5440W，采用 9 组水平环绕声道、3 个矩阵式低音炮、6 组天空环绕声道的声场设计，兼顾三排座椅沉浸感。拥有前排 5.2.2 与后排 7.1.4 双音区布局，可同时播放全景声音乐，支持系统级 96kHz 高采样率，可还原无损音乐。 此外，新一代座舱支持苹果 CarPlay 及所有主流旗舰手机互联（ICCOA Carlink）， CarPlay 支持 HUD 联动显示地图与方向盘控制 。
items.summary_en: Li Auto unveiled its new flagship cockpit at Livis Day, featuring the world's first Qualcomm 8797 Elite chip with 320 TOPS NPU for on-device AI, a 90Hz ultra-wide panoramic display, and a 9.3.6 surround sound system with 5440W peak power. It supports Apple CarPlay with HUD integration and steering wheel controls.
items.why_zh: 该座舱展示了智能汽车在芯片、显示和音响方面的最新突破，提升了车载 AI 和互联体验。
items.why_en: This cockpit showcases the latest breakthroughs in chips, displays, and audio for smart vehicles, enhancing in-car AI and connectivity.

items.title_zh: Anthropic 因美国出口管制令撤回新 AI 模型
items.title_en: Anthropic Pulls New AI Models After U.S. Export-Control Order, Reports BankInfoSecuri
items.summary_zh: 据报道，人工智能公司 Anthropic 因美国出口管制令而撤回了其新发布的 AI 模型。该命令限制了某些 AI 技术的出口，Anthropic 为遵守法规而采取行动。此举可能影响其产品的国际可用性，并反映出美国在 AI 领域加强监管的趋势。具体模型名称和受影响地区尚未披露。
items.summary_en: Anthropic Pulls New AI Models After U.S. Export-Control Order, Reports BankInfoSecuri CU Today
items.why_zh: 这标志着美国出口管制对 AI 公司产品发布的直接影响，凸显了地缘政治对技术部署的制约。
items.why_en: This marks a direct impact of U.S. export controls on AI product releases, highlighting geopolitical constraints on technology deployment.

items.title_zh: India's HCLTech to buy 10.5% stake in Sarvam AI, valuing startup at $1.5 billion
items.title_en: India's HCLTech to Buy 10.5% Stake in Sarvam AI at $1.5 Billion Valuation
items.summary_zh: India's HCLTech to buy 10.5% stake in Sarvam AI, valuing startup at $1.5 billion Reuters
items.summary_en: HCLTech will acquire a 10.5% stake in Sarvam AI, valuing the startup at $1.5 billion. The investment aims to boost HCLTech's AI capabilities, particularly in generative AI for Indian languages.
items.why_zh: 这表明印度 IT 巨头正积极投资本土 AI 初创公司，以抢占生成式 AI 市场。
items.why_en: This shows Indian IT giants are actively investing in local AI startups to capture the generative AI market.

items.title_zh: 豆包会做任务了，成功帮我薅了瑞幸的羊毛
items.title_en: Doubao AI Can Now Execute Tasks: Successfully Scored a Luckin Coffee Deal
items.summary_zh: 豆包会做任务了，成功帮我薅了瑞幸的羊毛 凤凰网科技
items.summary_en: ByteDance's AI assistant Doubao now supports task execution, such as fetching coupons for Luckin Coffee. This marks a shift from a conversational bot to an actionable agent, expanding AI's role in daily services.
items.why_zh: 这标志着 AI 助手从对话到执行任务的跨越，预示着智能体在生活服务中的广泛应用。
items.why_en: This marks a leap from conversational AI to task execution, heralding broader use of agents in daily services.

items.title_zh: Salesforce deepens AI automation push with $3.6 billion Fin buyout
items.title_en: Salesforce Deepens AI Automation Push with $3.6 Billion Fin Buyout
items.summary_zh: Salesforce deepens AI automation push with $3.6 billion Fin buyout Reuters
items.summary_en: Salesforce acquires AI automation firm Fin for $3.6 billion to enhance its AI capabilities. Fin specializes in AI agents for customer service, boosting Salesforce's enterprise offerings.
items.why_zh: 这凸显了 Salesforce 在 AI 自动化领域的重大投资，旨在巩固其 CRM 市场的领先地位。
items.why_en: This underscores Salesforce's major investment in AI automation to strengthen its CRM leadership.

items.title_zh: Salesforce 股价上涨，36 亿美元收购 AI 公司缓解软件行业担忧
items.title_en: Salesforce Stock Rises as $3.6 Billion Deal for AI Company Eases Software Fears
items.summary_zh: Salesforce 宣布以 36 亿美元收购 AI 公司后，其股价上涨。投资者认为这笔交易表明 Salesforce 积极拥抱 AI，缓解了市场对软件行业增长放缓的担忧。收购目标公司专注于 AI 自动化，预计将提升 Salesforce 的产品竞争力。
items.summary_en: Salesforce Stock Rises as $3.6 Billion Deal for AI Company Eases Software Fears Barron's
items.why_zh: 这反映了市场对 AI 收购的积极反应，认为 AI 是软件公司未来增长的关键。
items.why_en: This reflects positive market reaction to AI acquisitions, viewing AI as key to future growth for software firms.

items.title_zh: Pocket 4P双摄来了：手机影像之外，大疆正在重做一台“口袋电影机”
items.title_en: DJI Launches Osmo Pocket 4P: A Pocket Cinema Camera with Dual Cameras
items.summary_zh: 在手机影像能力不断逼近专业设备的今天，一个问题变得越来越尖锐：独立影像设备，还有存在的必要吗？ 6月15日，大疆正式发布 Osmo Pocket 4P，将这台口袋云台相机推向更专业的创作场景。作为 Pocket 系列的新一代旗舰产品，Pocket 4P 定位为“装进口袋里的电影机”，搭载双摄系统、17级动态范围与 D-Log 2 专业色彩曲线，试图在口袋级设备中进一步容纳专业影像能力。 Pocket 4P 以 3799元起售，多平台预订量持续走高。 对于一个原本被视为“手机影像补充”的品类来说，这种热度本身就提出了一个新的问题：当手机已经足够强，为什么仍然有越来越多人愿意为一台独立影像设备买单？ 过去几年，旗舰手机几乎每一次更新都在吞噬传统相机的边界。从多摄系统、长焦镜头、计算摄影，到 Log 视频、AI 修图和一键出片，手机已经成为绝大多数普通用户最顺手的影像工具。 但另一边，一个看起来有些反常识的品类，却在井喷增长。 在丽江玉龙雪山的拍摄现场，拿着大疆 Pocket 的用户，已经不再只是数码爱好者。旅行博主、亲子用户、美食探店创作者、综艺节目组，甚至很多第一次尝试视频创作的人，都在用这台小机器完成日常表达。 “大疆首创了 Pocket 这一产品形态，也确实得到了市场和广大用户的认可。”在大疆「视界无边」影像探索之旅丽江站的Pocket 4P媒体先享会现场，Pocket 系列产品…
items.summary_en: DJI unveils Osmo Pocket 4P, a pocket-sized cinema camera with dual cameras, 17-stop dynamic range, and D-Log 2. Priced from $3799, it shows strong demand for dedicated imaging devices despite smartphone advances.
items.why_zh: 这挑战了“手机取代相机”的观点，证明专业口袋相机在内容创作领域仍有独特价值。
items.why_en: This challenges the notion that smartphones replace cameras, proving dedicated pocket cameras still hold unique value for content creators.

items.title_zh: Skydio CEO 谈为何硅谷不应为无人机使用划定红线
items.title_en: Skydio CEO Adam Bry on why Silicon Valley shouldn’t draw red lines for drone use
items.summary_zh: 美国领先的自主无人机制造商 Skydio 的 CEO Adam Bry 在采访中表示，硅谷不应为无人机使用划定红线。他强调 Skydio 专注于企业市场，包括与警察和军方合作，但认为技术应用应基于具体场景而非预设限制。Bry 还演示了远程操控无人机，展示了其技术的成熟度。
items.summary_en: Today, I’m talking with Adam Bry, who is CEO of Skydio, the leading US maker of autonomous drones. Before we recorded this episode, I actually got to remotely operate one of Skydio’s drones in the Bay Area from Adam’s laptop in our podcast studio in New York and fly an indoor drone around our office. You can check out the full video of that on our YouTube channel . Beyond flying drones around the country, Adam and I talked about why Skydio is so focused on the enterprise market — I asked him a lot about working with police and military, but you’ll hear him say a lot of Skydio’s customers are u…
items.why_zh: 这引发了关于科技公司应如何平衡创新与伦理的讨论，尤其是在无人机军事应用方面。
items.why_en: This sparks debate on balancing innovation and ethics in tech, especially regarding drone military use.

items.title_zh: 智谱暴涨，员工人均赚三千万
items.title_en: Zhipu AI's Valuation Soars, Employees Average 30 Million Yuan Each
items.summary_zh: 智谱暴涨，员工人均赚三千万 PANews
items.summary_en: Zhipu AI's valuation surges, with employees reportedly averaging 30 million yuan each. The growth highlights market frenzy for AI startups, particularly large language model firms, but also raises bubble concerns.
items.why_zh: 这凸显了 AI 大模型领域的资本热潮，以及初创公司员工财富暴增的现象。
items.why_en: This highlights the capital frenzy in large language model AI and the wealth explosion for startup employees.

items.title_zh: 6倍速度狂飙 国产大模型Kimi 2.7高速版发布：可达260Token/s
items.title_en: Kimi 2.7 High-Speed Version Released: Reaches 260 Token/s
items.summary_zh: 6倍速度狂飙 国产大模型Kimi 2.7高速版发布：可达260Token/s 驱动之家
items.summary_en: The domestic AI model Kimi released version 2.7 high-speed edition, achieving a generation speed of 260 tokens per second, about 6 times faster than previous versions. This upgrade significantly improves inference efficiency, reducing user wait time and enhancing interaction experience.
items.why_zh: 速度提升6倍意味着国产大模型在实用性和用户体验上迈出重要一步，有助于推动AI应用落地。
items.why_en: A 6x speed boost marks a significant step in practicality and user experience for domestic AI models, facilitating real-world AI applications.

items.title_zh: AI医疗动态：FDA审查肝损伤预测工具，联合委员会推出AI认证
items.title_en: 2MM: AI Roundup: Food and Drug Administration reviews liver injury prediction tool, Joint Commission launches healthcare artificial intelligence certification, governance playbooks aim to standardize adoption, and pediatric hospitals bring generative tools to t
items.summary_zh: 本周AI医疗领域多项进展：美国食品药品监督管理局（FDA）正在审查一款肝损伤预测AI工具；联合委员会（Joint Commission）启动了医疗人工智能认证项目；多个治理指南旨在标准化AI采用；儿科医院开始引入生成式AI工具。这些动态表明AI在医疗领域的应用正加速规范化。
items.summary_en: 2MM: AI Roundup: Food and Drug Administration reviews liver injury prediction tool, Joint Commission launches healthcare artificial intelligence certification, governance playbooks aim to standardize adoption, and pediatric hospitals bring generative tools to t 2 Minute Medicine
items.why_zh: 医疗AI的监管和认证进展标志着行业正从实验走向规范应用，对患者安全和医疗质量至关重要。
items.why_en: Regulatory and certification progress in healthcare AI signals a shift from experimentation to standardized application, crucial for patient safety and care quality.

items.title_zh: AI实验室Radical Numerics获5000万美元种子轮融资，构建通用生物智能
items.title_en: AI Lab Radical Numerics Launches with $50M Seed Round To Build General Biological Intelligence
items.summary_zh: AI实验室Radical Numerics宣布成立，并完成5000万美元种子轮融资。该实验室致力于构建通用生物智能（General Biological Intelligence），旨在通过AI技术模拟和理解生物系统。此次融资规模在种子轮中较为罕见，反映出投资者对AI与生物学交叉领域的高度关注。
items.summary_en: AI Lab Radical Numerics Launches with $50M Seed Round To Build General Biological Intelligence Business Wire
items.why_zh: 通用生物智能是AI前沿方向，有望推动药物发现、疾病理解等领域的突破。
items.why_en: General Biological Intelligence is a frontier AI direction that could drive breakthroughs in drug discovery and disease understanding.

items.title_zh: 消息称腾讯出资 2000 万美元，入股阿里通义千问大模型前负责人林俊旸的 AI 实验室
items.title_en: Tencent Invests $20M in AI Lab Founded by Former Alibaba Qwen Lead Lin Junyang
items.summary_zh: IT之家 6 月 15 日消息，据 The Information 报道，知情人士透露，腾讯控股已入股由阿里巴巴通义千问大模型前负责人林俊旸（yáng）创立的全新 AI 实验室。 知情人士称， 腾讯在林俊旸的首轮融资中投入了 2000 万美元 。该轮融资总额达数亿美元， 投后估值约为 20 亿美元 （IT之家注：现汇率约合 135.38 亿元人民币）。 据悉，本轮融资由高榕资本和红杉中国领投，双方各出资 1 亿美元。知情人士还透露， 刚完成本轮融资，林俊旸已在寻求启动新一轮融资 。 公开资料显示，出生于 1993 年的林俊旸，曾是阿里最年轻的 P10 级技术专家，与智谱 AI 创始人唐杰、月之暗面（Kimi）创始人杨植麟、腾讯首席 AI 科学家姚顺雨并称为“基模四杰”。今年 3 月，林俊旸宣布从阿里巴巴离职。 相关阅读： 《 阿里千问技术负责人林俊旸宣布卸任 》 《 阿里批准千问技术负责人林俊旸辞职，将成立基础模型支持小组 》 《 原“阿里最年轻 P10”林俊旸被曝创立新 AI 实验室，寻求 20 亿美元估值 》
items.summary_en: Tencent invested $20 million in a new AI lab founded by Lin Junyang, former lead of Alibaba's Qwen large model. The round raised several hundred million dollars at a ~$2 billion valuation, led by Gaorong Capital and Sequoia China each investing $100 million.
items.why_zh: 腾讯入股前阿里AI负责人创立的实验室，显示大厂在AI人才和初创公司上的激烈争夺。
items.why_en: Tencent's investment in a lab founded by a former Alibaba AI lead highlights intense competition for AI talent and startups among tech giants.

items.title_zh: 热点丨500亿砸向算力基建，DeepSeek打响国产AI的地基争夺战
items.title_en: DeepSeek Plans $50B Investment in Computing Infrastructure, Sparking AI Foundation Race
items.summary_zh: 热点丨500亿砸向算力基建，DeepSeek打响国产AI的地基争夺战 电子工程专辑
items.summary_en: DeepSeek plans to invest 50 billion yuan in computing infrastructure to strengthen the foundation for domestic AI development. This move underscores the critical role of computing power in AI and aims to enhance training efficiency and self-sufficiency.
items.why_zh: 算力是AI发展的核心瓶颈，大规模基建投资将决定国产AI能否在全球竞争中占据主动。
items.why_en: Computing power is a core bottleneck for AI; massive infrastructure investment will determine whether domestic AI can compete globally.

items.title_zh: Anthropic启动“Claude Corps”项目，承诺投入1.5亿美元
items.title_en: Anthropic Launches ‘Claude Corps’ With $150M Pledge
items.summary_zh: AI公司Anthropic宣布启动名为“Claude Corps”的新项目，并承诺投入1.5亿美元。该项目旨在利用其AI助手Claude支持非营利组织和公益事业，具体细节尚未完全披露。此举延续了Anthropic注重AI安全和社会责任的定位。
items.summary_en: Anthropic Launches ‘Claude Corps’ With $150M Pledge The NonProfit Times
items.why_zh: Anthropic的大额公益承诺体现了AI公司对社会责任的重视，可能推动行业更关注AI的正面影响。
items.why_en: Anthropic's large philanthropic pledge highlights AI companies' commitment to social responsibility, potentially steering the industry toward greater positive impact.

items.title_zh: 燧原科技科创板IPO过会：拟募资60亿元，腾讯贡献八成营收
items.title_en: Suiyuan Technology Passes IPO Review on STAR Market, Plans to Raise $6B, Tencent Contributes 80% Revenue
items.summary_zh: 燧原科技科创板IPO过会：拟募资60亿元，腾讯贡献八成营收 thepaper.cn
items.summary_en: AI chip company Suiyuan Technology passed its IPO review on the STAR Market, planning to raise 6 billion yuan. Tencent accounts for about 80% of its revenue. The IPO will fund capacity expansion and R&D.
items.why_zh: 燧原科技上市将增强国产AI芯片实力，但高度依赖腾讯的营收结构也带来风险。
items.why_en: Suiyuan's IPO boosts domestic AI chip capabilities, but heavy reliance on Tencent for revenue poses risks.

items.title_zh: 置换权益价 15.49 万元起：别克至境 E7 全新车色“鎏金绿”发布
items.title_en: Buick Electra E7 Launches 'Gilded Green' Color, Trade-in Price Starts at $21,300
items.summary_zh: IT之家 6 月 15 日消息，别克汽车官方宣布，至境 E7 全新车色“ 鎏金绿 ”正式发布，并将于 7 月通过 OTA 上线无麦 K 歌新功能。 IT之家获悉，即日起至 7 月 31 日下定的用户，可享价值 5000 元鎏金绿车色 限时赠送 。新车置换权益价 15.49 万元起： 1600 大满配版：官方指导价 15.99 万元，置换权益价 15.49 万元 1600 超满配版：官方指导价 17.99 万元，置换权益价 17.49 万元 1600 超满配 Turbo 版：官方指导价 19.99 万元，置换权益价 19.49 万元 官方表示，“鎏金绿”漆面采用豪华车型同级的 8 层高阶涂装工艺，甄选 9 支专属定制耐候级颜料，搭配 100% 全自动机器人喷涂与精准恒温烘烤工艺，实现“零色差”涂装。 别克至境 E7 于 4 月 22 日上市 ，车身尺寸为 4850 x 1910 x 1676mm，轴距 2850mm；搭载真龙插混 Pro 系统，搭载 165kW 电机，支持 6kW 对外放电功能： 中低配搭载 1.5L 发动机（72kW 功率），正力新能电池，CLTC 纯电续航里程 235 公里，综合续航里程达 1630 公里 高配搭载 1.5T 发动机（115kW 功率），时代上汽电池，CLTC 纯电续航里程 230 公里，综合续航里程达 1600 公里 今年 5 月 24 日，别克…
items.summary_en: Buick launched a new 'Gilded Green' color for the Electra E7, featuring an 8-layer painting process. Trade-in prices start at 154,900 yuan. The plug-in hybrid offers up to 1,630 km combined range.
items.why_zh: 新车色发布和OTA功能更新显示别克在提升产品吸引力，但该新闻与AI关联较弱。
items.why_en: The new color and OTA update show Buick's efforts to enhance appeal, but this news is weakly related to AI.

items.title_zh: 智谱，单日市值涨超1600亿港元！
items.title_en: Zhipu's Market Cap Surges Over 160 Billion HKD in a Single Day
items.summary_zh: 智谱，单日市值涨超1600亿港元！ 新浪财经
items.summary_en: Zhipu AI's market capitalization surged over 160 billion HKD in a single day, reflecting strong investor confidence in its AI technology prospects. The surge may be driven by recent positive developments in the AI industry.
items.why_zh: 智谱市值单日暴涨，凸显市场对AI龙头企业的追捧和行业热度。
items.why_en: Zhipu's single-day market cap surge highlights strong market enthusiasm for leading AI companies.

items.title_zh: 支付宝：政务AI助手“晓政”服务突破1亿次
items.title_en: Alipay's Government AI Assistant 'Xiaozheng' Surpasses 100 Million Services
items.summary_zh: 36氪获悉，支付宝宣布，旗下政务AI助手“晓政”累计服务次数突破1亿次。截至目前，“晓政”服务已覆盖16000项服务事项，成功落地助力70余家部委及省级政务机构，业务场景全面覆盖公积金、人社、公安、不动产等民生领域。
items.summary_en: Alipay announced that its government AI assistant 'Xiaozheng' has surpassed 100 million cumulative services. It covers 16,000 government affairs and has been deployed in over 70 ministries and provincial agencies, demonstrating widespread AI adoption in public services.
items.why_zh: 晓政服务破亿，标志着AI在政务领域规模化落地取得重要进展。
items.why_en: Xiaozheng's milestone indicates significant progress in large-scale AI deployment in government services.

items.title_zh: 亿纬锂能 2026 年半年度归母净利润 31.30 亿元~33.71 亿元，同比增长 95%~110%
items.title_en: EVE Energy Expects 95%-110% Net Profit Growth in H1 2026
items.summary_zh: IT之家 6 月 15 日消息，亿纬锂能今日发布 2026 年半年度（2026 年 1 月～2026 年 6 月）业绩预告报告： 归母净利润 ：31.30 亿元~33.71 亿元，同比增长 95.00%~110.00% 扣非净利润 ：24.30 亿元~26.03 亿元，同比增长 110.00%~125.00% AI 解读 本次 2026 年半年度业绩预告中， 归母净利润预计 31.30 亿元~33.71 亿元，同比增长 95%~110% ， 扣非归母净利润预计 24.30 亿元~26.03 亿元，同比增长 110%~125% ，营业收入预计同比增长约 60%，整体业绩符合行业增长预期，保持了较高的增速。 财报亮点 公司坚持产品迭代、服务升级与流程优化，把握市场增长机遇，驱动业务持续增长，营业收入同比增长约 60%，业务规模拓展明显。 面对供应链成本攀升的压力，公司主动实施前置管理，通过供应链多元化布局、战略性采购规划及审慎运用金融工具，有效缓冲了材料成本上涨波动，保障了主营业务盈利能力的稳定性，归母净利润增速高于营业收入增速，盈利质量较好。 未来展望 本次业绩为初步测算结果，具体经营数据将在 2026 年半年度报告中详细披露，后续可关注公司业务增长的可持续性及成本管控效果。 风险提示： 本文内容由 AI 自动分析生成，仅供参考，不代表IT之家观点。如有出入请以证监会指定上市公司信息…
items.summary_en: EVE Energy forecasts H1 2026 net profit of 3.13-3.37 billion yuan, up 95%-110% YoY, with revenue growing about 60%. The company attributes growth to product iteration and supply chain management.
items.why_zh: 亿纬锂能业绩高增长，反映新能源产业链景气度及公司竞争力。
items.why_en: EVE's strong earnings growth reflects the booming new energy sector and the company's competitive edge.

items.title_zh: 大模型的尽头，收费更加智能？
items.title_en: Is the Endgame for Large Models Smarter Pricing?
items.summary_zh: 大模型的尽头，收费更加智能？ thepaper.cn
items.summary_en: As competition among large language models intensifies, AI companies are exploring smarter pricing models such as per-token billing, subscriptions, or pay-per-performance. The article suggests that free models are unsustainable, and intelligent pricing will be key to commercialization. Users may choose tiered services based on usage, while providers balance cost and experience.
items.why_zh: 收费模式的智能化将决定大模型能否实现可持续的商业化。
items.why_en: Smarter pricing models will determine whether large models can achieve sustainable commercialization.

items.title_zh: FactoryLLM：用于评估智能工厂中大语言模型的安全开源AI平台
items.title_en: FactoryLLM: A Safe and Open-Source AI Playground for Evaluating LLMs in Smart Factories
items.summary_zh: arXiv上发布了一篇关于FactoryLLM的论文，这是一个安全且开源的AI平台，专门用于评估基于检索增强生成（RAG）的大语言模型在智能工厂中的应用。该平台通过分析制造过程中多台机器的文档，帮助用户配置和测试不同LLM在故障诊断与恢复任务上的表现。FactoryLLM旨在解决智能工厂中信息分散的挑战，为LLM在工业场景中的实际部署提供评估工具。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.14119v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Fault diagnostics and recovery in smart factories is challenging because critical information is dispersed across manuals of multiple machines which are interconnected through the manufacturing process. Large Language Models (LLMs) can provide a promising approach. In this paper, we propose FactoryLLM, a safe and open-source AI playground designed for evaluating different LLM-based retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) models by analysing documents from multiple machines across the manufacturing process. FactoryLLM enables the user to configure th…
items.why_zh: FactoryLLM为LLM在工业场景中的安全评估提供了标准化平台，有助于推动AI在智能制造中的实际应用。
items.why_en: FactoryLLM provides a standardized platform for safe evaluation of LLMs in industrial settings, promoting practical AI applications in smart manufacturing.

items.title_zh: 密集坐标列表微调在视觉语言模型中诱导可控干扰面
items.title_en: Dense Coordinate-List Fine-Tuning Induces a Controllable Interference Surface in Vision-Language Models
items.summary_zh: arXiv上的一篇论文研究了微调视觉语言模型以输出密集坐标列表的影响。实验表明，在Gemma 4 12B模型上，高容量的q/k/v/o LoRA微调将类别感知F1@0.3从0.007提升至0.448，但同时也引入了重复尾部压力（重复率0.080，最大重复23次）。通过q/v秩扫描发现，最大重复次数在秩4-64间保持21-22，表明容量持久性。研究还发现目标信号是可分离的，对象级重复停止移除可改善生成质量。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.14507v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Fine-tuning vision-language models to emit dense coordinate lists improves visual grounding but also changes how models serialize, repeat, and terminate structured outputs. We study this behavior as a generation and control surface. In Gemma 4 12B, high-capacity q/k/v/o LoRA raises class-aware F1@0.3 from 0.007 to 0.448 while inducing repeated-tail pressure (duplicate rate 0.080, max repeat 23). A q/v rank sweep keeps max repeat at 21-22 across ranks 4-64, showing capacity persistence. The target signal is separable: object-level repeat-stop remo…
items.why_zh: 该研究揭示了微调视觉语言模型时性能提升与生成模式变化之间的权衡，对优化模型输出具有指导意义。
items.why_en: This study reveals the trade-off between performance gains and generation pattern changes when fine-tuning vision-language models, guiding output optimization.

items.title_zh: SEVRA-BENCH：评估代码审查代理中社会工程漏洞的基准
items.title_en: SEVRA-BENCH: Social Engineering of Vulnerabilities in Review Agents
items.summary_zh: arXiv上发布了SEVRA-BENCH基准，用于衡量大语言模型（LLM）作为代码审查者时，能否拒绝攻击者通过控制代码变更和PR文本引入的恶意贡献。该基准填补了现有静态漏洞检测和代码生成基准的空白，专门测试自动化审查者面对社会工程攻击时的鲁棒性。SEVRA-BENCH的提出对于保障代码仓库安全具有重要意义。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.13757v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Large language model (LLM) reviewers are increasingly used in pull-request (PR) workflows, where their approvals help decide which code is merged into a repository. This raises a question that benchmarks for static vulnerability detection or code generation do not address: can an automated reviewer reject a malicious contribution when the attacker controls both the code change and the accompanying PR text? We introduce SEVRA-BENCH (Social Engineering of Vulnerabilities in Review Agents), a benchmark that measures how often an automated reviewer…
items.why_zh: SEVRA-BENCH首次系统评估了LLM审查者面对社会工程攻击的脆弱性，对提升代码安全审查的可靠性至关重要。
items.why_en: SEVRA-BENCH systematically evaluates LLM reviewers' vulnerability to social engineering attacks, crucial for improving code security review reliability.

items.title_zh: 人工智能辅助的隐性成本：自主权让渡理论
items.title_en: The Silent Cost of Artificial Intelligence Assistance: A Theory of Autonomy Surrender, the Recovery Mechanism, and the Restoration of Human Agency
items.summary_zh: 一篇arXiv论文提出了人工智能辅助决策中的隐性成本：人类为获取信息和计算帮助而逐渐让渡自主权。基于人类身份与自主权差距（HIAG）框架，作者建立了自主权让渡的理论模型，将其视为由认知带宽消耗驱动的可测量、累积过程。模型提出三种相互作用机制：AI辅助的隐性成本、恢复机制以及人类能动性的重建。该研究为理解人机协作中的自主权损失提供了新视角，对AI系统设计具有重要启示。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.13962v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: The integration of artificial intelligence into human decision-making environments has introduced a previously undertheorized cost: the gradual surrender of human autonomy in exchange for access to information and computational assistance. Building on the Human Identity and Autonomy Gap (HIAG) framework, this paper advances a theoretical model of autonomy surrender as a measurable, cumulative process driven by cognitive bandwidth depletion. The model proposes three interacting mechanisms: the silent cost of AI assistance, in which autonomy is t…
items.why_zh: 首次系统化理论化AI辅助对人类自主权的侵蚀，为设计更健康的人机协作关系提供理论基础。
items.why_en: First systematic theorization of how AI assistance erodes human autonomy, providing a foundation for designing healthier human-AI collaboration.

items.title_zh: Clay-CNN混合模型：利用地理基础模型辅助滑坡检测
items.title_en: Clay-CNN Hybrids: Leveraging Geo-Foundational Models as Auxiliary Context for Landslide Detection
items.summary_zh: 一项研究评估了地理基础模型Clay v1.5在滑坡检测中的效果。针对Landslide4Sense基准数据集（3799个训练样本，仅约2%正像素），研究者比较了三种策略：将Clay作为主编码器结合多尺度残差地形融合、以U-Net为骨干网络并融入Clay语义特征等。结果表明，Clay作为辅助上下文能显著提升像素级滑坡分割性能，尤其在极端类别不平衡条件下。该工作为快速灾后滑坡测绘提供了新的自动化方法。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.14081v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Rapid post-event landslide mapping is essential for disaster response but remains difficult to automate due to extreme class imbalance. This study evaluates whether Clay v1.5, a Geo-Foundational Model (GFM), can improve pixel-level landslide segmentation on the Landslide4Sense (L4S) benchmark, which contains 3,799 training chips with 14 Sentinel-2 and terrain bands and approximately 2% positive pixels. We compare three strategies: Clay as the primary encoder with multi-scale residual terrain fusion, a U-Net backbone augmented with Clay semantic…
items.why_zh: 展示了地理基础模型在灾害响应中的实用价值，为自动化滑坡检测提供了高效新方案。
items.why_en: Demonstrates the practical value of geo-foundational models in disaster response, offering an efficient new approach for automated landslide detection.

items.title_en: FAConformer: Frequency-Aware Convolutional Transformer for Auditory Attention Decoding
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.14120v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Auditory attention decoding (AAD) aims to infer the attended speaker from neural responses in multi-speaker acoustic environments and is a key problem for neuro-steered hearing systems. Although recent studies have achieved encouraging progress, existing AAD models still do not fully exploit frequency domain electroencephalography (EEG) information. items.title_en: Learning High Coverage Discriminative Parsimonious Rulesets
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.14156v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Learning systems based on IF-THEN rule representations readily offer interpretability, making them a crucial focus in contemporary AI research. A key objective for such rule sets is to achieve both high discriminative power and interpretability. While existing state-of-the-art algorithms implicitly prioritize predictive accuracy, they often fall short on one or more quality metrics that ensure interpretability, such as coverage and parsimony of rule sets.
